title: mentha suaveolens
intro: Mentha suaveolens, also known as round-leaf mint or pineapple mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Mentha suaveolens include its ability to alleviate nausea, improve respiratory issues, and enhance the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Mentha suaveolens can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in aromatherapy due to its refreshing and calming scent.
